description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 17, 2025 at 11:33 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Rolland Curtis Place near Normandie Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound on Rolland Curtis Place in autonomous mode and came to a stop to stage a maneuver towards the 
curb and to yield to a passenger car traveling westbound on Rolland Curtis Place. After the passenger car passed the Waymo AV, the 
Waymo AV proceeded forward, came to a stop, and then reversed into a vacant space at the curb in between two parked passenger cars. The 
Waymo AV came to a stop at the curb. The test driver of the Waymo AV then transitioned to manual mode and reversed, and the rear of the 
Waymo AV made contact with the front of the passenger car that was parked behind the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo 
AV's Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
